mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(progress_seconds), 0) as total_seconds FROM learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('in_progress', 'completed')

SELECT COUNT(s.id) as totalSections FROM user_courses uc JOIN courses c ON uc.course_id = c.id JOIN chapters ch ON c.id = ch.course_id JOIN sections s ON ch.id = s.chapter_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lp.section_id) as completedSections FROM user_courses uc JOIN courses c ON uc.course_id = c.id JOIN chapters ch ON c.id = ch.course_id JOIN sections s ON ch.id = s.chapter_id JOIN learning_progress lp ON s.id = lp.section_id AND lp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND lp.status = 'completed'

WITH course_sections AS ( SELECT s.id AS section_id FROM sections s JOIN chapters ch ON s.chapter_id = ch.id WHERE ch.course_id = #{courseId} ), user_progress AS ( SELECT lp.section_id, lp.status FROM learning_progress lp JOIN course_sections cs ON lp.section_id = cs.section_id WHERE lp.user_id = #{userId} ) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_progress) = 0 THEN 'not_started' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_progress) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_sections) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_progress WHERE status != 'completed') THEN 'completed' ELSE 'in_progress' END AS course_status FROM courses c WHERE c.id = #{courseId}
